creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
Hello.

I guess Daniel already volunteered to maintain the port so why not? Actually I'm happy to give away rundeck2 also - we moved all hosts to Linux so I kindda lost the need in it. It's a legacy version so not much updates there. I only suggested to leave rundeck2 in ports as we (as a company) still have an ongoing effort to upgrade to rundeck3 and it's not going out nicely...

@Daniel. welcome to the club, buddy. I'm not a pro at maintaining/creating ports, but that shouldn't be that hard. I think I even ripped most of the rundeck port from some other java port. Everything will work the same way: you are adding a bug, attaching diff, someone with a commit bit chimes in and commits it. If you need help - just say it out loud. There are mailing lists, groups at matrix, at telegram, irc, almost everywhere.

Cheers!
